overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of Spider-Man walking through a New York City street at night. The scene features autumn foliage, brick buildings, street lighting, and pedestrians, with the character moving at a steady walking pace through urban environments including crosswalks, sidewalks, and past parked vehicles.

events.description: Spider-Man begins crossing the street at a crosswalk
finishes crossing and transitions onto concrete sidewalk

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks across the crosswalk and continues along the sidewalk next to a brick building, moving at a steady pace

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man crosses a city street at night, moving from the crosswalk onto a concrete sidewalk beside a historic brick building adorned with American flags. Street lamps cast warm light on the autumn scene as pedestrians walk in the opposite direction and parked cars line the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk next to brick wall with newspaper truck

events.description: Daily Bugle newspaper truck comes into view parked on the right
National Guard recruitment banner becomes visible on left wall

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man continues walking along the sidewalk, passing the Daily Bugle truck and pedestrians on their phones

notable_agents.action: woman in business suit looking at phone while walking

entered.detail: red delivery truck with 'Daily Bugle' newspaper branding
blue banner with 'National Guard' text on brick wall
tall brick wall running along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrower sidewalk section, Spider-Man passes a red Daily Bugle newspaper truck parked on the right and a National Guard recruitment banner mounted on the brick wall to the left. The crowd density increases slightly as more pedestrians appear, some engrossed in their phones.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with crosswalk and parked delivery van

events.description: Spider-Man steps onto crosswalk to cross the street
passes white delivery van parked on the right side of sidewalk

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crosses another intersection, navigating through groups of pedestrians, then continues past a white delivery van

notable_agents.action: white car driving down the street

entered.detail: white commercial van with 'High Line Storage' text on side
wooden park bench with two people sitting
street intersection with traffic lights and crossing pedestrians

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man crosses another city intersection, moving from one sidewalk to another. After crossing, he walks past a white delivery van parked on the right and a park bench where people are seated on the left. The street has moderate vehicle traffic with cars driving by in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk next to construction fence with distant city lights

events.description: environment becomes darker as Spider-Man enters area with construction fencing
overhead highway structure and construction cranes visible in distance

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man continues walking along a darker sidewalk section next to a chain-link construction fence, with fewer pedestrians around

entered.detail: chain-link construction fence running along the sidewalk
elevated highway or bridge structure spanning across the street
construction cranes silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Spider-Man walking along a darker, more industrial section of sidewalk bordered by a chain-link construction fence on the left. The area is less crowded with fewer pedestrians, and features distant city lights, construction cranes, and an overhead highway structure visible against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling New York City street at night that gradually shifts from a historic urban neighborhood to a darker industrial zone. It begins with Spider-Man crossing a street and stepping onto a concrete sidewalk beside a brick building adorned with American flags under the warm glow of street lamps. As he continues forward, the path narrows, leading him past a red Daily Bugle truck and a recruitment banner while the crowd of pedestrians becomes more dense. The scene then shifts as he crosses another intersection, moving past a white delivery van and a park bench amidst moderate vehicle traffic. Finally, the environment opens into a more desolate area, where the camera follows him along a chain-link construction fence toward distant cranes and an overhead highway structure against the night sky.
